summary.health_impact: Database requires attention. 24 critical issues found.

categories.name: missing_primary_keys
categories.recommendation: Add primary keys to improve data integrity and query performance

categories.name: missing_indexes
categories.recommendation: Consider adding indexes on frequently queried columns

categories.name: large_tables_no_index
categories.description: Large tables (>10K rows) missing proper indexing
categories.recommendation: Priority indexing needed for tables with high row counts

categories.name: orphan_tables
categories.description: Tables not linked to any module classification
categories.recommendation: Review table purpose and classify appropriately
